holdings.infoBox: ETEC is an equity ETF with a total of 63 individual holdings. The top holdings are Allegro MicroSystems stock at 8.52%, YASKAWA Electric at 7.49%, BorgWarner at 6.85%, Contemporary Amperex Technology at 6.60%, and Kurita Water Industries at 6.31%.

overview.description: The iShares Breakthrough Environmental Solutions ETF (ETEC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of global companies involved in breakthrough innovations addressing climate transition. The fund selects stocks by utilizing an Adoption Curve that contributes to a companys aggregate score (sum of revenue earned from green technology and product innovation score) ETEC was launched on Mar 28, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Morningstar Global Emerging Green Technologies Select Index
